languages.text: {n}Визор пса мерцает, сканируя кожу сетью лучей. Наконец, механический щелчок, остывающий гул сервомоторов — и аугментика проктора отзывается слабым жужжанием: анализ завершен, данные — переданы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Визор пса мерцает, сканируя кожу сетью лучей. Наконец, механический щелчок, остывающий гул сервомоторов — и аугментика проктора отзывается слабым жужжанием: анализ завершен, данные — переданы.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The dog's visor shimmers as it scans his skin with a mesh of rays. Finally, there is a metallic click and the descending hum of cooling servo-motors. The Proctor's augmetics respond with a soft buzz: analysis complete; data transferred.{/n}

languages.text: {n}犬のバイザーがかすかに光を放ち、網状の光線でソロモーンの皮膚をスキャンする。やがて金属的なカチリという音と、冷却用サーボモーターの唸りが静かに響き渡った。代理人のオーグメティックが微かな振動音を発した。「解析完了。データ転送完了」{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The dog's visor shimmers as it scans his skin with a mesh of rays. Finally, there is a metallic click and the descending hum of cooling servo-motors. The Proctor's augmetics respond with a soft buzz: analysis complete; data transferred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}犬のバイザーがかすかに光を放ち、網状の光線でソロモーンの皮膚をスキャンする。やがて金属的なカチリという音と、冷却用サーボモーターの唸りが静かに響き渡った。代理人のオーグメティックが微かな振動音を発した。「解析完了。データ転送完了」{/n}

languages.text: {n}Köpeğin vizörü parıldıyor, efendisinin avucunu ışın ağıyla tarıyor. Nihayetinde metalik bir tıklama ve soğuyan hizmotorların alçalan vızıltısı duyuluyor. Gözetmenin ogmetikleri hafif bir vızıltı ile tepki veriyor: analiz tamamlandı; veri aktarıldı.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The dog's visor shimmers as it scans his skin with a mesh of rays. Finally, there is a metallic click and the descending hum of cooling servo-motors. The Proctor's augmetics respond with a soft buzz: analysis complete; data transferred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Köpeğin vizörü parıldıyor, efendisinin avucunu ışın ağıyla tarıyor. Nihayetinde metalik bir tıklama ve soğuyan hizmotorların alçalan vızıltısı duyuluyor. Gözetmenin ogmetikleri hafif bir vızıltı ile tepki veriyor: analiz tamamlandı; veri aktarıldı.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El visor del perro brilla mientras escanea su piel con una red de rayos. Finalmente, se produce un clic metálico y el zumbido de los servomotores de enfriamiento se reduce. Los auméticos del Procurador responden con un sonido leve: análisis completado; datos transferidos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The dog's visor shimmers as it scans his skin with a mesh of rays. Finally, there is a metallic click and the descending hum of cooling servo-motors. The Proctor's augmetics respond with a soft buzz: analysis complete; data transferred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El visor del perro brilla mientras escanea su piel con una red de rayos. Finalmente, se produce un clic metálico y el zumbido de los servomotores de enfriamiento se reduce. Los auméticos del Procurador responden con un sonido leve: análisis completado; datos transferidos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}射线透过格雷托的面甲，扫描着索罗蒙的皮肤。随后，格雷托体内传来了金属的咔哒声与伺服电机冷却的嗡鸣声，而索罗蒙身上的植入物发出了微弱的滴滴声——分析完成，数据转移完成。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The dog's visor shimmers as it scans his skin with a mesh of rays. Finally, there is a metallic click and the descending hum of cooling servo-motors. The Proctor's augmetics respond with a soft buzz: analysis complete; data transferred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}射线透过格雷托的面甲，扫描着索罗蒙的皮肤。随后，格雷托体内传来了金属的咔哒声与伺服电机冷却的嗡鸣声，而索罗蒙身上的植入物发出了微弱的滴滴声——分析完成，数据转移完成。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La visière du chien s'illumine tandis qu'il analyse la peau de son maître à l'aide d'une batterie de rayons. Au bout de quelques instants, vous entendez un cliquetis métallique et le vrombissement décroissant de servomoteurs en train de refroidir. En réponse, les augmétiques du proctor émettent un léger bourdonnement : analyse terminée, données transférées.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The dog's visor shimmers as it scans his skin with a mesh of rays. Finally, there is a metallic click and the descending hum of cooling servo-motors. The Proctor's augmetics respond with a soft buzz: analysis complete; data transferred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La visière du chien s'illumine tandis qu'il analyse la peau de son maître à l'aide d'une batterie de rayons. Au bout de quelques instants, vous entendez un cliquetis métallique et le vrombissement décroissant de servomoteurs en train de refroidir. En réponse, les augmétiques du proctor émettent un léger bourdonnement : analyse terminée, données transférées.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Visor des Hundes schimmert, als ein seine Haut mit einem Geflecht aus Strahlen scannt. Schließlich ertönt ein metallisches Klicken und das Summen abkühlender Servomotoren. Die Augmentationen des Proktors reagieren mit einem leisen Surren: Analyse abgeschlossen. Daten übertragen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The dog's visor shimmers as it scans his skin with a mesh of rays. Finally, there is a metallic click and the descending hum of cooling servo-motors. The Proctor's augmetics respond with a soft buzz: analysis complete; data transferred.{/n}
